#  View Drawing Markups (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher to the Drawings tool.  
_Note:_ Users can view all published markups and their own personal markups. See [Publish Personal Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/publish-personal-drawing-markups-android).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the drawing you want to view.
  3. View markups on the drawing using the following actions:
     * Zoom in and pan around the drawing to view markups.
     * Tap a markup to view its details.
     * Filter drawing markups to view certain types of markups. See [Filter Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/filter-drawing-markups-android).


## See Also
  * [Filter Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/filter-drawing-markups-android)
  * [Edit Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/edit-drawing-markups-android)
  * [Drawings (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/permissions)
title: View Drawing Markups (Android)
description: How to view drawing markups using Procore's Drawings tool on an Android device.
